name: Cubed Pork Mix
recipeIngredient: 4 teaspoons instant chicken bouillon granules, OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet; add pork cubes. Cook until lightly browned, stirring occasionally.
2. Drain and reserve drippings. Add onions. Cook, stirring for 10-15 minutes or until onions are golden.
3. Sprinkle flour over pork mixture. Stir gently until flour is absorbed, about 1 minute.
4. Add water to the drippings to make 4 cups liquid. Stir liquid, bouillon granules or cubes, salt, and pepper into pork mixture.
5. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally. Cover; cook over low heat for 2 hours longer, or until pork is tender.
6. Remove from heat. Cool.
7. Ladle the mixture into five 2-cup freezer containers with tight-fitting lids, leaving 1/2 inch air space at the top of each one.
8. Secure lids; label each container with date and contents. Store in the freezer. Use within 6 months.
Makes 5 packages or 10 cups of Cubed Pork Mix.
